mmcv_gpu_blocker: mmcv C++ ext (.so) was compiled for PyTorch 2.1.0+cu121 and is not ABI-compatible with PyTorch 2.11.0+cu130. No pre-built mmcv wheel for Python 3.11 + PyTorch 2.11 + cu130 exists. Source build fails due to pkg_resources import in mmcv setup.py. RTMPose OKS accuracy benchmarked on CPU (accuracy unchanged). GPU latency not measured via mmpose.
